name: pilot-dotnet
description: C# / ASP.NET Core codebase governance: Clean Architecture, SOLID/DRY, coding standards, performance, caching, permissions-ONLY authorization (no role checks, ever; JWT PII/permission hardening), multitenancy, soft delete, audit fields (Guid-typed), CORS, repository pattern, shared libraries, Excel/PDF document I/O (with malware-scan/signature verification), templated email service, Guid entity keys, API versioning, modular DI/clean Program.cs, Hangfire background jobs, DB-backed dynamic configuration, XML+DB localization, HTTP and EF Core resilience (Polly, EnableRetryOnFailure), observability (health checks/OpenTelemetry), centralized error handling (ProblemDetails), request validation, integration testing, PII data protection, optimistic concurrency, rate limiting, the transactional outbox pattern, feature flags (Microsoft.FeatureManagement), SignalR/streaming real-time patterns, compliance-grade access-audit logging, financial/currency precision, secrets rotation, and consumer-driven API contract testing
